title: DecisionRecord
description: Layer 7 output — the completed decision record written to data/journal/

date.description: Decision date YYYY-MM-DD — used in journal filename

philosophy_fit_notes.description: Rationale for philosophy_fit, especially used when the Chief Analyst reclassifies the screened archetype.

entry_price.description: Chief Analyst's recommended single entry price per share (the price at which the up/down ratio meets the 2:1 threshold). Null if recommendation is 'blocked', scenario prices invalid, or bull_scenario ≤ current_price (inverted setup).

entry_range.description: Acceptable entry band around entry_price. Null under the same conditions as entry_price.

entry_price_rationale.description: Chief Analyst's rationale: current_price, both scenario prices, up/down ratio at current, and the output case applied (in-band / above-band with computed entry / inverted with null entry).

current_price_used.description: Absolute current price the Chief Analyst anchored against, for auditability.

learning_hooks.description: Bull + bear learning hooks persisted for 90/180/365-day outcome tracking

action.description: What the investor actually decided to do

position_size_pct.description: Position size as % of portfolio (null if action is watch/pass)

override_recommendation.description: Investor's actual decision when overriding the analyst
